name: VM Job Card After Submit
script:
vms_list = frappe.get_all("VM Schedule Details", 
        filters = [
            ["VM Schedule Details", "vmsd_service", "=",  doc.vmjc_job],
            ["VM Schedule Details", "parent", "=",  doc.vmjc_vehicle],
            ["VM Schedule Details", "parentfield", "=",  "vms_schedule"],
            ["VM Schedule Details", "parenttype", "=",  "Vehicle Maintenance Schedule"],
        ],
        fields=["name"]
    )

for vms in vms_list:
    vms_doc = frappe.get_doc("VM Schedule Details", vms.get("name"))
    vms_doc.vmsd_last_odometer = doc.vmjc_end_odometer
    vms_doc.vmsd_last_maintenance_date = doc.vmjc_end_date
    vms_doc.save()

name: Datatable Vehicle Maintenance Record
script:
vehicle = json.loads(frappe.form_dict.data)
if vehicle and vehicle.get("name"):
    filters = [["Vehicle Maintenance Record", "vmr_vehicle", "=", vehicle.get("name")], ["Vehicle Maintenance Record", "docstatus", "!=", "2"]]
    fields = ["vmr_vehicle", "vmr_driver", "vmr_date", "vmr_job_start", "vmr_start_odo", "vmr_job_end", "vmr_end_odo", "vmr_estimated_cost", "vmr_actual_cost"]
    vmr_list = frappe.get_all("Vehicle Maintenance Record", fields=fields, filters=filters)
    
    columns = [
        {"width": 150,"name":"Driver", "indent":1},
        {"width": 150,"name":"Jobs", "indent":2},
        {"width": 150,"name":"Date", "indent":1},
        {"width": 150,"name":"Job Start", "indent":1},
        {"width": 150,"name":"Job End", "indent":1},
        {"width": 150,"name":"Job Start Odometer", "indent":1},
        {"width": 150,"name":"Job End Odometer", "indent":1},
        {"width": 150,"name":"Estimated Cost", "indent":1},
        {"width": 150,"name":"Actual Cost", "indent":1}
    ]
    data = []
    for i in vmr_list:
        filters = [["VM Job Card", "vmjc_vmr", "=", i.get("name")]]
        fields = ["vmjc_part_total", "vmjc_part_rate", "part_quantity", "vmjc_spare_part", "vmjc_is_spare_part", "vmjc_job", "vmjc_end_odometer", "vmjc_end_time", "vmjc_end_date", "vmjc_in_odometer", "vmjc_start_time", "vmjc_start_date"]
        vm_job_card_list = frappe.get_all("VM Job Card", fields=fields, filters=filters)
        
        data.append([
            {"content":i.get("vmr_driver")},
            {"content":i.get("vmr_date")},
            {"content":i.get("vmr_job_start")},
            {"content":i.get("vmr_job_end")},
            {"content":i.get("vmr_start_odo")},
            {"content":i.get("vmr_end_odo")},
            {"content":i.get("vmr_estimated_cost")},
            {"content":i.get("vmr_actual_cost")},
            {"content":i.get("vmr_actual_cost")},
            ])
        
    frappe.response['data'] = data
    frappe.response['columns'] = columns
else:
    frappe.response["message"] = "vehicle data is required"

name: Datatable Vehicle Maintenance Schedule
script:
vehicle = json.loads(frappe.form_dict.data)
if vehicle and vehicle.get("name"):
    filters = [["Vehicle Maintenance Schedule", "vms_vehicle", "=", vehicle.get("name")]]
    fields = ["vms_vehicle"]
    vms_list = frappe.get_all("Vehicle Maintenance Schedule", fields=fields, filters=filters)
    columns = [
        {"width": 150,"name":"Service"},
        {"width": 150,"name":"Part"},
        {"width": 150,"name":"Maintenance Period Type"},
        {"width": 150,"name":"Distance"},
        {"width": 150,"name":"Duration"}
    ]
    data = []
    for i in vms_list:
        filters = [["VM Schedule Details", "parent", "=", i.get("name")], ["VM Schedule Details", "parentfield", "=", "vms_schedule"], ["VM Schedule Details", "parenttype", "=", "Vehicle Maintenance Schedule"]]
        fields = ["vmsd_service", "vmsd_part", "vmsd_maintenance_period_type", "vmsd_distance", "vmsd_duration"]
        vms_schedule = frappe.get_all("VM Schedule Details", fields=fields, filters=filters)
        for j in vms_schedule:
            data.append([
                {"content":j.get("vmsd_service")},
                {"content":j.get("vmsd_part")},
                {"content":j.get("vmsd_maintenance_period_type")},
                {"content":j.get("vmsd_distance")},
                {"content":j.get("vmsd_duration")}
                ])
    frappe.response['data'] = data
    frappe.response['columns'] = columns
else:
    frappe.response["message"] = "vehicle data is required"

name: Datatable VM Job Card
script: vehicle_maintenance_record = json.loads(frappe.form_dict.data) if vehicle_maintenance_record and vehicle_maintenance_record.get("name"): filters = [["VM Job Card", "vmjc_vmr", "=", vehicle_maintenance_record.get("name")]] fields = ["name","vmjc_part_total", "vmjc_part_rate", "part_quantity", "vmjc_spare_part", "vmjc_is_spare_part", "vmjc_job", "vmjc_end_odometer", "vmjc_end_time", "vmjc_end_date", "vmjc_in_odometer", "vmjc_start_time", "vmjc_start_date"] vm_job_card_list = frappe.get_all("VM Job Card", fields=fields, filters=filters) columns = [ {"editable": False, "width": 150,"name":"Job"}, {"editable": False, "width": 150,"name":"Spare Part Needed?"}, {"editable": False, "width": 150,"name":"Spare Part"}, {"editable": False, "width": 150,"name":"Start Date"}, {"editable": False, "width": 150,"name":"End Date"}, {"editable": False, "width": 150,"name":"Start Time"}, {"editable": False, "width": 150,"name":"End Time"}, {"editable": False, "width": 150,"name":"Start Odometer"}, {"editable": False, "width": 150,"name":"End Odometer"}, {"editable": False, "width": 150,"name":"Part Quantity"}, {"editable": False, "width": 150,"name":"Part Rate"}, {"editable": False, "width": 150,"name":"Part Total"} ] data = [] for i in vm_job_card_list: data.append([ {"content": ''+i.get("vmjc_job")+'!'}, {"content": "yes" if i.get("vmjc_is_spare_part") else "No"}, {"content":i.get("vmjc_spare_part")}, {"content":i.get("vmjc_start_date")}, {"content":i.get("vmjc_end_date")}, {"content":i.get("vmjc_start_time")}, {"content":i.get("vmjc_end_time")}, {"content":i.get("vmjc_in_odometer")}, {"content":i.get("vmjc_end_odometer")}, {"content":i.get("part_quantity")}, {"content":i.get("vmjc_part_rate")}, {"content":i.get("vmjc_part_total")}, ]) frappe.response['data'] = data frappe.response['columns'] = columns else: frappe.response["message"] = "vehicle data is required"

name: Get Last VM Job Card
Trip After Submit
script:
vms_doc = frappe.get_doc("Vehicle Maintenance Schedule", doc.t_vehicle)
vms_doc.vms_last_trip_odo = doc.t_end_odo
vms_doc.vms_last_trip_ref = doc.name
vms_doc.save()
